sql:
select
            A.nren_id,
            A.nren_name,
            A.node_id,
            A.if_id as node_int,
            if.if_nm,
            coalesce(regexp_replace((reverse((regexp_match(reverse(if.if_nm), E'G[0-9]+'))[1])), 'G', ''), cast(cast(A.bandwidth as bigint) / 1000000000 as bigint)::char) as bandwidth,
            A.customer_id,
            A.email,
            row_number() over (ORDER BY nren_id) rnum,
            count(1) over () as "AgencyTotalCount"
        from resource.tb_user_organ A
        left outer join (select distinct node_id, if_id, if_nm from resource.tb_port_mst) if on if.node_id = A.node_id and if.if_id = A.if_id
        where 1=1
        ORDER BY nren_id
